! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
stderr 'no template "sseClock" for sse argument sseClock'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /events Events(sse, sseClock)" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.24
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

// sseClock has no matching template, so generation fails.
func (Server) Events(sse, sseClock func(data string) error) {
	_, _ = sse, sseClock
}
